overview: Enterprise-grade financial services ERP + CRM platform with role-based dashboards for Admin, Branch Manager, Staff, and Finance Manager. Features 8 complete modules including Lead CRM with Kanban, Task Management, Attendance tracking, Finance analytics, and Performance dashboards — all with premium fintech UI.
features: Role-based dashboards for 4 user types (Admin, Branch Manager, Staff, Finance Manager)
Lead Management CRM with drag-and-drop Kanban board and activity timeline
Branch and Staff management with search, filters, and analytics
Task Management with Kanban, list, and calendar views
Finance dashboard with P&L charts and branch revenue analytics
Performance dashboard with leaderboards and trend graphs
Dark mode, responsive design, loading skeletons, and empty states
